title: Kitty Cat Totem
description: A pink cat totem of undying texturepack made by Rosefli
body:
A Cat totem made by Rosefli

This texture pack includes a totem of undying which is animated and its a PINK cat

The pack is currently made for 1.21.11 and it should work on more versions, but I´m not sure as I´ve only tried it on 1.21.11
